setup.note: Official GitHub-hosted remote MCP server. Use OAuth when possible. GitHub docs also support PAT authentication as an alternative in the separate PAT preset. References: https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/how-tos/provide-context/use-mcp-in-your-ide/set-up-the-github-mcp-server and https://github.com/github/github-mcp-server/blob/main/docs/remote-server.md
